rules.stale_hub_ref_ids: Hard failure: public hubs or sitemap reference session IDs absent from Class Report.xlsx.
rules.stale_html_ids: Hard failure only when obsolete HTML files remain for session IDs absent from Class Report.xlsx; --cleanup quarantines them.
rules.retained_past_page_ids: Class pages present in Class Report.xlsx but absent from schedule_future.json are retained past/non-public pages and are not failures unless publicly referenced.
